CustomField.description: Maps to Recurring_Donation__c.InstallmentFrequency__c on the Recurring Donation during data import processing. Combined with Installment Period, defines the donation schedule (e.g., frequency of 3 with period Monthly = every 3 months).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter how often installments occur within the Installment Period (e.g., 3 with Monthly period means every 3 months).
CustomField.label: Recurring Donation Installment Frequency
